text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower's popularity has skyrocketed since
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But one day, Mihono Bourbon, who up until now
has never had any issues despite her intense
training, sustains an injury.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower spirals, thinking the injury is her fault
because the two of them just became rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But when talking to Bourbon directly about the
issue, she states definitively that the injury has
nothing to do with Rice Shower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Stunned by her words, Rice Shower is unable to
say anything in reply.
